description: Full-width hero section with headline, optional subtitle, optional CTA buttons (primary + secondary), and optional image. Supports four layout variants.

id.description: Optional HTML id attribute for anchor linking (e.g. navigation anchors).

subtitle.description: Supporting subheadline shown below the title.

cta_text.description: Primary CTA button label. Leave empty to hide both buttons.

cta2_text.description: Secondary CTA button label. Renders as outline/ghost style. Only shown when cta_text is also set.

variant.description: Layout variant. 'centered' centers all content. 'left' aligns content left. 'split' places text left and image right at lg+. 'cover' uses image_url as a full-width background image with dark overlay and white text.

image_url.description: Image URL. Rendered as an inline image in 'split' variant, or as a CSS background-image in 'cover' variant.

image_alt.description: Alt text for the split variant image. Use a descriptive string for meaningful images; leave empty only if image is purely decorative.
